title: No Portals
description: Disable Nether Portals, End Portals, and End Gateways at your will.
body: # No Portals Disable Nether Portals, End Portals, and End Gateways at your will. Tested in 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.20.2, 1.20.4, 1.21, 1.21.3, and above. ## Options Configure this mod by using `/noportals` in game or editing `noportals.json` in the world folder. ## Requirements Minecraft Version 1.19+ [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
